title: heliacme scorzonerifolia
intro: Heliacme scorzonerifolia, also known as Hairy Heliocline, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Heliacme scorzonerifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used as a topical application in the form of a salve or ointment, making it a versatile remedy in natural medicine.
